changes.before: Sea years lived in the way she planted her boots.
changes.after: She planted her boots with the certainty of long years at sea.

changes.before: No rescue hidden in it. No second thought from Dalaran or Silvermoon. Just facts.
The sort institutions could still carry after the power to alter anything had failed.
changes.after: The sort of facts that still passed hand to hand after the power to alter anything had failed.

changes.before: Not because she meant to draw it. The temptation had burned out somewhere between Stratholme and the coast.
changes.after: The temptation had burned out somewhere between Stratholme and the coast.

changes.before: The whole vessel answered the water in small muscular adjustments her knees resented on principle.
changes.after: The whole vessel flexed with the water in small muscular adjustments her knees resented on principle.

changes.before: That was the cruelty of it.
The net yard gave back a foot of distance, then another.
changes.after: The distance to the net yard opened by a foot, then another.

changes.before: No spell. No last attempt. Just the amber weight of it in her palm, dull as old resin.
changes.after: The amber weight of it lay in her palm, dull as old resin.

changes.before: No blind reaching. No force for its own sake.
A sailor on pump duty changing out with another so quickly she noticed only because the cough was different.
changes.after: A sailor on pump duty changed out with another; the cough was different.

changes.before: "Not a mage's some." "A real some, then."
The sea had kept it distant all morning by occupying every other sense.
changes.after: Cold, motion, and deck labor had kept it distant all morning.

changes.before: No gentleness in it. Just a hard drag into the lee of the stern ladder, where a body could go down without being trampled.
changes.after: Sylvanas dragged her into the lee of the stern ladder, where a body could go down without being trampled.

changes.before: Transaction. Necessity. Fit for both of them.
Arthas had not merely passed through. He had been here long enough to cut dock, land stores, and move inland.
changes.after: Arthas had been here long enough to cut dock, land stores, and move inland.
